title: Eva 01 and 02s restrictions and possible symbolism
display_title: Eva 01 and 02s restrictions and possible symbolism
wikitext:
[]: Eva 01 and 02´s restrictions and possible symbolism?             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Dec 05, 2010 6:54 am When 01 goes Berserk, his jaw opens. When 02 "awakens", he gets 4 additional eyes to the 4 cameras(?) he already has. If 01´s jaw restriction is to hinder it from eating things(S2 engines and stuff), then are they trying to hinder 02 from... seeing? Has anybody here tried to link these two things together? What do you guys think? ^ From the Japanese Newtype 100% Collection artbook.

[]: Or maybe it's just because it looks freakin' awesome?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sun Dec 05, 2010 10:01 am That's an interesting thought. But the reason they have Unit-01 so restricted is because of its relationship to Lilith, so they know what will happen if it gets its hands (teeth?) on an S2 Organ. Unit-02 was cloned from Adam just like Units -00, -03, and -04, and, as far as I'm aware, there's nothing special about it that would require additional restrictions like are necessary for Unit-01. Might it be that the cameras are there to enhance its eyesight so that it is better able to fight the Angels, seeing as how it's supposed to be the final production model? Notice that the MP Evas don't have eyes at all; maybe the Evas' natural eyes were deemed inefficient and were completely replaced with electronic sensory equipment. ...if you'll excuse me, I'll be doing some further fanwanking in the corner over there. EDIT: While I'm thinking about it, does anyone have some side-by-side comparisons of the NGE Unit-02 design and the EoE redesign?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Dec 20, 2010 8:14 am AFAIK, unlike eyes, there's no major motif with mouths/jaws/eating in the series, so I think trying to connect these two things would be rather dubious. Eyes do seem to be consistently related to cores, though. I wish more people would try to fanwank that connection, because the series makes it obvious quite a few times.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Dec 20, 2010 11:22 am I think it's more a function of Eva design than anything else. Compared to Eva-01, Eva-02 has a puny mouth and four eyes hidden behind huge goggles with movable plates covering them- weird, but so's the rest of the Eva's head.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 20, 2010 1:27 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Eyes do seem to be consistently related to cores, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Dec 21, 2010 6:54 am Reichu wrote:
